evidence: EVM IR permits Unit entrypoint returns and rejects Unit let bindings through lowerStatement diagnostics.

Bool literals, predicates, ABI parameters, return values, scalar storage, storage-map keys/values, and storage-array values lower to Yul 0/1 words; EvmTypedStorageProbe validates Bool scalar storage and Bool fixed storage arrays, and EvmTypedMapProbe validates Bool storage maps plus calldata guards.

U32 values and ABI parameters lower as EVM words with dispatcher range guards; scalar U32 storage is accepted by validateState, EvmTypedStorageProbe validates U32 fixed storage arrays, and EvmTypedMapProbe validates U32 storage maps plus U32 calldata range guards.

U64 values and ABI parameters lower as EVM words; Counter IR covers scalar U64 storage and return values, and EvmExpressionProbe validates U64 arithmetic, bitwise, predicate, local, literal, and return expressions.

EvmHashProbe validates Hash as a one-word EVM ABI/storage value, including Hash params, Hash returns, Hash locals, and scalar Hash storage; EvmTypedMapProbe validates Hash storage map keys and values.

EvmStorageArrayProbe validates U64 fixed storage arrays; EvmTypedStorageProbe validates U32, Bool, and Hash fixed storage arrays; EvmArrayValueProbe validates immutable and mutable local fixed-array values over U64, U32, Bool, and Hash elements with static and dynamic indexes, including element assignment, whole-local assignment, and numeric compound assignment; EvmStructArrayValueProbe validates local fixed arrays of flat structs with static/dynamic field reads, mutable field updates, and whole-local assignment with RHS snapshotting; EvmAbiAggregateProbe validates flat static fixed-array ABI parameters/returns, including fixed arrays of flat structs flattened to ABI words; diagnostics reject immutable element assignment, static out-of-bounds literals, zero-length ABI arrays, nested ABI arrays, and unsupported element shapes.

EvmStructValueProbe validates flat immutable and mutable local struct values over U64, U32, Bool, and Hash fields, including field assignment, whole-local assignment, and numeric compound assignment; EvmStructArrayValueProbe validates flat struct elements inside local fixed arrays over U64, U32, Bool, and Hash fields, including whole local assignment from local arrays and self-referential array literals; EvmAbiAggregateProbe validates flat ABI-facing struct parameters/returns and fixed arrays of flat structs in ABI-facing parameters/returns; EvmStorageStructProbe validates flat scalar storage structs, whole scalar storage struct reads/writes, and fixed storage arrays of flat structs; diagnostics reject immutable field assignment, nested fields, and unsupported struct field shapes.

EVM IR lowers scalar Bool/U32/U64/Hash state to direct slot-based sload/sstore and lowers flat scalar storage structs as one slot per field with whole-struct read/write expansion; EvmTypedStorageProbe validates Bool scalar storage and EvmStorageStructProbe validates flat scalar storage structs; diagnostics reject unsupported scalar types.

EvmMapProbe validates Map<U64, U64, N> storage via Solidity-style keccak256(key, slot) mapping slots; EvmTypedMapProbe validates word key/value maps over U32, Bool, and Hash; diagnostics reject non-word map key/value shapes.

EvmStorageArrayProbe validates U64 fixed storage arrays as contiguous EVM storage slots with runtime bounds checks; EvmTypedStorageProbe validates U32, Bool, and Hash fixed storage arrays as contiguous EVM storage slots with runtime bounds checks; EvmStorageStructProbe validates fixed storage arrays of flat structs as contiguous field-expanded slots with runtime bounds checks; diagnostics reject unsupported array element types.
EvmExpressionProbe validates U32 literals in arithmetic, bitwise, cast, and assertion expressions.
EvmExpressionProbe validates U64 literals in arithmetic, bitwise, predicate, and assertion expressions.
EvmExpressionProbe validates Bool literals in predicate equality/inequality and assertion expressions.
EvmHashProbe validates four-limb Hash literals packed into one EVM bytes32 word.
ContextProbe lowers userId context reads to Yul caller() and Foundry verifies a vm.prank sender.
ContextProbe lowers contractId context reads to Yul address() and Foundry verifies the etched runtime address.
ContextProbe lowers checkpointId context reads to Yul number() and Foundry verifies a vm.roll block number.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage addition compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage subtraction compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage multiplication compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage division compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage modulo compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage bitwise-and compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage bitwise-or compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage bitwise-xor compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage shift-left compound assignment with EVM shl operand ordering; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage shift-right compound assignment with EVM shr operand ordering; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmExpressionProbe validates U32/U64/Bool literal lowering through arithmetic, bitwise, predicate, cast, and assertion expressions; EvmHashProbe validates Hash literal packing.
EvmExpressionProbe validates local identifier lowering through immutable local bindings consumed by arithmetic, bitwise, predicate, cast, and return expressions.

EvmArrayValueProbe validates fixed-array literals as immutable and mutable local fixed-array initializers, whole-local assignment values, and direct literal-index sources for U64, U32, Bool, and Hash values; EvmStructArrayValueProbe validates array literals of flat struct values as local fixed-array initializers and whole-local assignment values with RHS snapshotting; EvmAbiAggregateProbe validates fixed-array return data from local aggregate values; standalone array values remain explicit diagnostics.

EvmArrayValueProbe validates local fixed-array static and dynamic index reads, direct fixed-array literal static and dynamic index reads, mutable local element assignment targets, and numeric element compound assignment targets; EvmStructArrayValueProbe validates arrayGet feeding struct field reads/writes over static and dynamic local indexes; dynamic local indexes lower to switch/helper-based runtime bounds checks and diagnostics reject static out-of-bounds indexes.

EvmStructValueProbe validates struct literals as immutable and mutable local struct initializers and direct field-access sources; EvmStructArrayValueProbe validates struct literals as local fixed-array elements; EvmAbiAggregateProbe validates struct return data from struct literals; standalone struct values remain explicit diagnostics.

EvmStructValueProbe validates field access over immutable/mutable local struct values, direct struct literals, mutable local field assignment targets, and numeric field compound assignment targets; EvmStructArrayValueProbe validates field access over arrayGet(local struct array, index) with static and dynamic indexes plus assignment and compound assignment targets; diagnostics reject non-struct bases and unsupported field shapes.
EvmExpressionProbe validates direct U64 and U32 addition expressions through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates direct U64 and U32 subtraction expressions through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates direct U64 and U32 multiplication expressions through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates direct U64 and U32 division expressions through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates direct U64 and U32 modulo expressions through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates direct U64 exponentiation lowering to Yul exp through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates direct U64 and U32 bitwise-and expressions through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates direct U64 and U32 bitwise-or expressions through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates direct U64 and U32 bitwise-xor expressions through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates direct U64 and U32 shift-left expressions with EVM shl operand ordering through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates direct U64 and U32 shift-right expressions with EVM shr operand ordering through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates supported U32/U64/Bool casts as pass-through word expressions, including U32/Bool calldata guards before cast use.
EvmExpressionProbe validates U64 and Bool equality predicates through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates U64 and Bool inequality predicates through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates U64 less-than predicates through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates U64 less-or-equal predicates through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates U64 greater-than predicates through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates U64 greater-or-equal predicates through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates boolean conjunction expressions through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates boolean disjunction expressions through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmExpressionProbe validates boolean negation expressions through golden Yul and Foundry runtime results.
EvmHashProbe validates dynamic four-limb Hash construction with Yul shl/or packing.
EvmHashProbe validates crypto.hash as keccak256 over one 32-byte Hash word.
EvmHashProbe validates crypto.hash_two_to_one as keccak256 over two contiguous 32-byte Hash words.
ContextProbe validates nativeValue lowering to Yul callvalue(), metadata capability value.native, and Foundry value-bearing calls.

EvmCrosscallProbe validates crosscallInvoke lowering to arity-specific Yul call helpers with selector packing, word arguments, call failure reverts, short-return reverts, and one-word return decoding.
lowerExpr delegates effects to lowerEffectExpr; scalar word reads lower directly, scalar struct reads lower only in aggregate contexts, and statement-only or unsupported effects reject.

lowerEffectExpr emits sload(slot) for word scalars; whole scalar storage struct reads expand to per-field sload words in struct local bindings, struct returns, whole local struct assignment, and field access; Counter and EvmHashProbe cover U64 and Hash scalar reads, EvmTypedStorageProbe covers Bool scalar reads, EvmStorageStructProbe covers flat scalar struct reads, and diagnostics cover statement misuse.

lowerEffectStmt emits sstore(slot, value) for word scalars and expands whole flat scalar storage struct writes into per-field sstore operations with RHS snapshotting; Counter and EvmHashProbe cover U64 and Hash scalar writes, EvmTypedStorageProbe covers Bool scalar writes, EvmStorageStructProbe covers flat scalar struct writes, and diagnostics reject expression-position writes.
lowerEffectStmt emits sstore(slot, op(sload(slot), value)); EvmAssignOpProbe validates all AssignOp variants on U64 scalar storage and diagnostics reject expression-position or non-numeric use.

lowerEffectExpr emits a bool read from ProofForge-managed map presence slots; EvmMapProbe validates U64 contains semantics including zero-valued present keys and raw presence slots, EvmTypedMapProbe validates U32, Bool, and Hash key presence, and diagnostics reject statement-position contains.
lowerEffectExpr emits sload(__proof_forge_map_slot(slot, key)); EvmMapProbe validates U64 ABI reads and raw Foundry vm.load slots, and EvmTypedMapProbe validates U32, Bool, and Hash map reads.

lowerEffectExpr emits __proof_forge_map_set_return and statement position emits __proof_forge_map_write; both helpers write the value slot and ProofForge-managed presence slot; EvmMapProbe validates U64 previous-value returns, writes, and presence slots, and EvmTypedMapProbe validates U32 insert semantics.

lowerEffectExpr emits __proof_forge_map_set_return and statement position emits __proof_forge_map_write; both helpers write the value slot and ProofForge-managed presence slot; EvmMapProbe validates U64 previous-value returns, Unit set dispatch, writes, and presence slots, and EvmTypedMapProbe validates U32, Bool, and Hash set semantics.

EvmStorageArrayProbe validates storage.array.read lowering to guarded sload(add(baseSlot,index)) over U64 storage arrays; EvmTypedStorageProbe validates U32, Bool, and Hash storage-array reads, including out-of-bounds reverts.

EvmStorageArrayProbe validates storage.array.write lowering to guarded sstore(add(baseSlot,index),value) over U64 storage arrays; EvmTypedStorageProbe validates U32, Bool, and Hash storage-array writes, raw slot updates, and U32 write range guards.
EvmStorageStructProbe validates storage.array.struct.field.read lowering to guarded sload(base + index * field_count + field_offset) over fixed storage arrays of flat structs.
EvmStorageStructProbe validates storage.array.struct.field.write lowering to guarded sstore(base + index * field_count + field_offset, value) over fixed storage arrays of flat structs.
EvmStorageStructProbe validates storage.struct.field.read lowering to sload(base + field_offset) for flat scalar storage structs.
EvmStorageStructProbe validates storage.struct.field.write lowering to sstore(base + field_offset, value) for flat scalar storage structs.

EvmMapProbe validates single-segment mapKey path reads over Map<U64, U64, N>; EvmTypedMapProbe validates mapKey path reads over U32, Bool, and Hash word maps; EvmStorageArrayProbe validates single-segment index path reads over U64 storage arrays; EvmTypedStorageProbe validates index path reads over U32, Bool, and Hash storage arrays; EvmStorageStructProbe validates field paths over scalar storage structs and index+field paths over fixed storage arrays of structs.

EvmMapProbe validates single-segment mapKey path writes over Map<U64, U64, N>; EvmTypedMapProbe validates mapKey path writes over U32 and Bool word maps; EvmStorageArrayProbe validates single-segment index path writes over U64 storage arrays; EvmTypedStorageProbe validates index path writes over U32, Bool, and Hash storage arrays; EvmStorageStructProbe validates field paths over scalar storage structs and index+field paths over fixed storage arrays of structs.

EvmMapProbe validates single-segment mapKey path compound assignment over Map<U64, U64, N> for all AssignOp variants; EvmTypedMapProbe validates numeric mapKey path compound assignment over U32 maps; EvmStorageArrayProbe validates index path compound assignment over U64 storage arrays; EvmTypedStorageProbe validates numeric index path compound assignment over U32 storage arrays; EvmStorageStructProbe validates numeric field path compound assignment over scalar storage structs and fixed storage arrays of structs.
lowerEffectExpr emits EVM context opcodes for expression-position context reads; diagnostics still reject statement-position context reads.

EventProbe validates eventEmit lowering to Yul log1 with topic0 = keccak256(Solidity-style event signature) and 32-byte word data fields; diagnostics reject expression-position events and malformed names.

EventProbe validates indexed event lowering to Yul log2 with topic0 = keccak256(Solidity-style event signature), one indexed topic, and non-indexed 32-byte word data; diagnostics reject expression-position indexed events and more than 3 indexed fields.
EvmStorageStructProbe validates field as a scalar storage-struct path segment and as the second segment after index for fixed storage arrays of structs.

EvmStorageArrayProbe validates index as the first and only storage-path segment for EVM U64 fixed storage-array reads, writes, and compound assignment; EvmTypedStorageProbe validates index paths over U32, Bool, and Hash fixed storage arrays; EvmStorageStructProbe validates index as the first segment before field for fixed storage arrays of structs.

EvmMapProbe validates mapKey as the first and only storage-path segment for EVM Map<U64, U64, N> reads, writes, and compound assignment; EvmTypedMapProbe validates mapKey over U32, Bool, and Hash word maps.

EvmExpressionProbe validates immutable scalar U32/U64/Bool let bindings; EvmHashProbe validates Hash let bindings; EvmArrayValueProbe, EvmStructValueProbe, and EvmStructArrayValueProbe validate aggregate let binding expansion; diagnostics reject unsupported types.

AssignmentProbe validates mutable scalar Yul let bindings for U64 and Bool locals; EvmAssignOpProbe validates mutable U32/U64 locals consumed by compound assignments; EvmArrayValueProbe, EvmStructValueProbe, and EvmStructArrayValueProbe validate mutable aggregate local expansion.

AssignmentProbe validates Yul assignment for mutable scalar local targets; EvmArrayValueProbe validates mutable local fixed-array element assignment and whole fixed-array local assignment with RHS snapshotting; EvmStructValueProbe validates mutable local struct field assignment and whole struct local assignment with RHS snapshotting; EvmStructArrayValueProbe validates mutable struct field assignment inside local fixed arrays with static and dynamic indexes plus whole struct-array local assignment with RHS snapshotting; diagnostics reject invalid targets and immutable locals.

lowerStatement emits Yul assignments for mutable local scalar, fixed-array element, struct field, and struct-array field compound assignment; EvmAssignOpProbe validates all AssignOp variants for scalar locals and EvmArrayValueProbe/EvmStructValueProbe/EvmStructArrayValueProbe validate aggregate numeric field/element compound assignment; diagnostics reject invalid targets, immutable locals, and non-numeric operands.
lowerStatement delegates effects to lowerEffectStmt; scalar writes lower and unsupported effects reject.
AssertProbe and EvmExpressionProbe validate Yul if iszero(condition) revert guards through passing paths and Foundry revert behavior.
AssertProbe and EvmExpressionProbe validate Yul if iszero(eq(lhs, rhs)) revert guards through passing paths and Foundry revert behavior.
ConditionalProbe validates Yul switch/case/default lowering for if/else through then/else storage updates; EvmLoopProbe validates branch-local early returns through Yul leave.
EvmLoopProbe validates boundedFor lowering to Yul for loops with scalar storage updates and loop-local early returns through Yul leave; diagnostics reject invalid loop ranges.

EvmExpressionProbe validates one-word scalar return assignment and dispatch encoding; EvmAbiAggregateProbe validates multi-word flat struct/fixed-array returns; EvmLoopProbe validates nested return lowering with Yul leave and non-final top-level return path analysis.
